Led..personality: The Ledum patient is robust, plethoric, and full-blooded with a strong constitution, yet prone to loss of ambition and indolence. They may become sedentary, unwilling to work, and dependent on others, particularly when affected by chronic conditions or alcohol abuse.
Led..mental_state: The mental state is characterized by a dulled, besotted quality with diminished drive and self-neglect, resembling the torpor of an old drunkard. There is a general mental heaviness and sluggishness that accompanies the constitutional coldness and venous congestion characteristic of the remedy.
Led..emotional_pattern: Emotionally, the Ledum patient tends toward irritability and abusiveness, particularly when intoxicated, becoming extremely difficult and harsh toward family members. There is an underlying pattern of resignation and withdrawal, sitting passively while suffering intensely, enduring agony rather than seeking active solutions.
